title: Her Husband Lies
writer: Oliver H.P. Garrett, Wallace Smith, Eve Greene
actors: Gail Patrick, Ricardo Cortez, Akim Tamiroff
plot: Her Husband Lies is a 1937 American drama film directed by Edward Ludwig and written by Wallace Smith and Eve Greene. The film stars Gail Patrick, Ricardo Cortez, Akim Tamiroff, Tom Brown, Louis Calhern and June Martel. The film w...
